description_for_human: Portable proof infrastructure for autonomous AI agents. Evaluate actions against policy, produce signed receipts as cryptographic proof, and build tamper-evident audit trails.
description_for_model: ZeroPoint provides a governance gate for AI agent actions. Send an action description to POST /api/v1/guard/evaluate to get a policy decision (Allow/Block/Warn/Review/Sanitize) with a signed receipt as cryptographic proof, plus an audit entry. Use POST /api/v1/capabilities/grant to issue capability grants, POST /api/v1/capabilities/delegate to delegate to sub-agents, and POST /api/v1/capabilities/verify-chain to verify delegation chains. All decisions are hash-chained in a tamper-evident audit trail accessible via GET /api/v1/audit/entries. Receipts are Ed25519-signed with Blake3 content hashes.
